title: Testing APIs with Postman / Insomnia
description: Use tools to test and debug your API endpoints.

slides.title: API Testing Tools 🧪
slides.content:
# Why Test APIs?

- Verify endpoints work as expected.
- Check error handling.
- Automate regression testing.
- Document API behavior.

Popular tools:
- **Postman** – GUI, collections, environments, tests.
- **Insomnia** – similar, open‑source.
- **cURL** – command line.
- **Swagger UI** – interactive documentation.

slides.title: Testing with Postman – Basic Steps 📬
slides.content:
## Using Postman

1. Create a new request.
2. Enter URL (e.g., `http://localhost:3000/books`).
3. Select HTTP method (GET, POST, etc.).
4. For POST/PUT, go to Body tab, select `raw` and `JSON`, enter data.
5. Click Send.
6. Inspect response status, body, headers.

You can save requests in collections and run them with the Collection Runner.

slides.title: Writing Tests in Postman ✍️

quizData.question: Which tool allows you to write and run automated tests for APIs?

options.text: Both Postman and Insomnia support testing

quizData.explanation: Both Postman and Insomnia have built-in test scripting capabilities.
